commit.subject: LU-6808 ptlrpc: BULK_BITS recovery for old servers
commit.message:
LU-6808 ptlrpc: BULK_BITS recovery for old servers

Never ever change the xid for resend and replay RPCs.

Test-Parameters: alwaysuploadlogs envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el6.8 mdsdistro=el6.8 clientarch=x86_64 ossarch=x86_64 mdsarch=x86_64 mdsjob=lustre-b_ieel2_0 ossjob=lustre-b_ieel2_0 ossbuildno=274 mdsbuildno=274 mdtcount=1 ostcount=2 clientcount=2 testlist=replay-single,replay-single,replay-single,replay-single
Signed-off-by: Jinshan Xiong <jinshan.xiong@intel.com>
Change-Id: Idb3f0227ed02076ba9e8bcf85b6ba5f7dcd8b3b3
